$comment: Canonical Slack channel map. scripts/slack_ops.mjs ensure-channels reads this file to create any missing channels in the getsnippd workspace. Each channel mirrors a department and a topic prefix that the agent team uses in posts.

channels.name: ops-control-center
channels.purpose: Every automated event from any department. See-everything feed. Slack-side mirror of GitHub issue #27.

channels.name: action-needed
channels.purpose: The founder-action queue. Mirrors issue #37 body on every sync. Reply in the Founder approval inbox workflow to clear items.

channels.name: app-review
channels.purpose: App Store review audit runs land here. Dept: cx.

channels.name: wins
channels.topic: [wins] Shipped PRs, hit metrics, closed actions
channels.purpose: Celebration channel. post_win.mjs posts here on merges and hit scorecards.

channels.name: dept-cx
channels.purpose: Support tickets, App Store reviews, researcher insights. Mirrors issue #30.

channels.name: dept-product
channels.purpose: Roadmap, specs, release notes. Mirrors issue #31.

channels.name: dept-data
channels.purpose: Neo4j, ETL, ML, dashboards. Mirrors issue #32.

channels.name: dept-revops
channels.purpose: Stripe, dunning, disputes, unit economics. Mirrors issue #33.

channels.name: dept-legal
channels.purpose: ToS, DMCA, DSAR, privacy. Private by policy — counsel + compliance operator only. Mirrors issue #34.

channels.name: dept-partnerships
channels.purpose: Retailer deals, CPG sponsorships, integrations. Mirrors issue #35.

channels.name: dept-marketing
channels.purpose: Brand, content, social, creative, SEO, lifecycle, community, analyst, paid. Mirrors issue #36.
